title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: An economics-focused podcast episode discussing how AI advancement might paradoxically reduce AI's share of economic value as productivity increases, and examining policy questions around taxation, wealth redistribution, and global inequality in an AGI-enabled world. Key topics include capital versus labor share, scenarios for economic transition, and strategies for developing nations.
